Notes.Text:
This update for grub2 fixes the following issues:

- CVE-2024-56738: Fixed side-channel attack due to not constant-time algorithm in grub_crypto_memcmp (bsc#1234959)
Notes.Title: Details

Notes.Title: Patchnames

Vulnerabilities.Description: GNU GRUB (aka GRUB2) through 2.12 does not use a constant-time algorithm for grub_crypto_memcmp and thus allows side-channel attacks.
